name: MySQL 中间件基线 (CIS Benchmark + 等保 2.0)
description: MySQL 5.7 / 8.0 安全配置基线. 参考 CIS MySQL Benchmark.

fix.command:
set -e; F=/etc/my.cnf; [ -f "$F" ] || { printf '[mysqld]
' > "$F"; }; [ -f "$F.mxbak" ] || cp "$F" "$F.mxbak"; if grep -Eq '^[[:space:]]*user[[:space:]]*=' "$F"; then sed -ri 's|^[[:space:]]*user[[:space:]]*=.*|user = mysql|' "$F"; else grep -Eq '^[[:space:]]*\[mysqld\]' "$F" && sed -ri '0,/^[[:space:]]*\[mysqld\]/s||[mysqld]
user = mysql|' "$F" || printf '[mysqld]
user = mysql
' >> "$F"; fi; mysqld --user=mysql --help --verbose >/dev/null 2>&1 || { mv "$F.mxbak" "$F"; echo 'config validate failed, rolled back'; exit 1; }

rules.title: 数据目录权限 = 700
rules.description: datadir 仅 mysql 用户访问.

fix.command: set -e; [ -d /var/lib/mysql ] || { echo 'datadir /var/lib/mysql not found'; exit 1; }; chown -R mysql:mysql /var/lib/mysql; chmod 700 /var/lib/mysql

rules.title: 配置文件权限 ≤ 640
rules.description: my.cnf 含 default password / SSL 路径.

fix.command: set -e; [ -f /etc/my.cnf ] || { echo '/etc/my.cnf not found'; exit 1; }; chown root:mysql /etc/my.cnf; chmod 640 /etc/my.cnf

param: mysql -uroot -BNe 'SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mysql.user WHERE user=""' 2>/dev/null

fix.suggestion: DELETE FROM mysql.user WHERE user=''; FLUSH PRIVILEGES;
fix.command: mysql -uroot -e "DELETE FROM mysql.user WHERE User=''; FLUSH PRIVILEGES;"

rules.title: 禁用 test 数据库
rules.description: 默认 test schema 必须删除.

rules.title: 禁止远程 root
rules.description: root 账号 host 必须为 localhost / 127.0.0.1, 不允许 %.

param: mysql -uroot -BNe 'SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mysql.user WHERE user="root" AND host NOT IN ("localhost","127.0.0.1","::1")' 2>/dev/null

fix.suggestion: DROP USER 'root'@'%'; CREATE USER 'admin'@'10.%' IDENTIFIED BY '...'; GRANT ...;

rules.title: bind-address 仅本地 (或内网)
rules.description: 生产应 bind 内网 IP, 默认 0.0.0.0 暴露公网风险.

fix.command:
set -e; F=/etc/my.cnf; [ -f "$F" ] || { printf '[mysqld]
' > "$F"; }; [ -f "$F.mxbak" ] || cp "$F" "$F.mxbak"; if grep -Eq '^[[:space:]]*bind-address[[:space:]]*=' "$F"; then sed -ri 's|^[[:space:]]*bind-address[[:space:]]*=.*|bind-address = 127.0.0.1|' "$F"; else grep -Eq '^[[:space:]]*\[mysqld\]' "$F" && sed -ri '0,/^[[:space:]]*\[mysqld\]/s||[mysqld]
bind-address = 127.0.0.1|' "$F" || printf '[mysqld]
bind-address = 127.0.0.1
' >> "$F"; fi; mysqld --user=mysql --help --verbose >/dev/null 2>&1 || { mv "$F.mxbak" "$F"; echo 'config validate failed, rolled back'; exit 1; }

rules.title: general_log 关闭
rules.description: general_log 含明文 SQL, 生产关闭.

fix.command:
set -e; F=/etc/my.cnf; [ -f "$F" ] || { printf '[mysqld]
' > "$F"; }; [ -f "$F.mxbak" ] || cp "$F" "$F.mxbak"; if grep -Eq '^[[:space:]]*general_log[[:space:]]*=' "$F"; then sed -ri 's|^[[:space:]]*general_log[[:space:]]*=.*|general_log=OFF|' "$F"; else grep -Eq '^[[:space:]]*\[mysqld\]' "$F" && sed -ri '0,/^[[:space:]]*\[mysqld\]/s||[mysqld]
general_log=OFF|' "$F" || printf '[mysqld]
general_log=OFF
' >> "$F"; fi; mysqld --user=mysql --help --verbose >/dev/null 2>&1 || { mv "$F.mxbak" "$F"; echo 'config validate failed, rolled back'; exit 1; }

set -e; F=/etc/my.cnf; [ -f "$F" ] || { printf '[mysqld]
' > "$F"; }; [ -f "$F.mxbak" ] || cp "$F" "$F.mxbak"; install -d -o mysql -g mysql -m 750 /var/log/mysql; if grep -Eq '^[[:space:]]*log[-_]error[[:space:]]*=' "$F"; then sed -ri 's|^[[:space:]]*log[-_]error[[:space:]]*=.*|log-error=/var/log/mysql/error.log|' "$F"; else grep -Eq '^[[:space:]]*\[mysqld\]' "$F" && sed -ri '0,/^[[:space:]]*\[mysqld\]/s||[mysqld]
log-error=/var/log/mysql/error.log|' "$F" || printf '[mysqld]
log-error=/var/log/mysql/error.log
' >> "$F"; fi; mysqld --user=mysql --help --verbose >/dev/null 2>&1 || { mv "$F.mxbak" "$F"; echo 'config validate failed, rolled back'; exit 1; }

rules.title: binlog_format=ROW
rules.description: STATEMENT 模式存在 SQL 注入审计盲点.

fix.command:
set -e; F=/etc/my.cnf; [ -f "$F" ] || { printf '[mysqld]
' > "$F"; }; [ -f "$F.mxbak" ] || cp "$F" "$F.mxbak"; if grep -Eq '^[[:space:]]*binlog_format[[:space:]]*=' "$F"; then sed -ri 's|^[[:space:]]*binlog_format[[:space:]]*=.*|binlog_format=ROW|' "$F"; else grep -Eq '^[[:space:]]*\[mysqld\]' "$F" && sed -ri '0,/^[[:space:]]*\[mysqld\]/s||[mysqld]
binlog_format=ROW|' "$F" || printf '[mysqld]
binlog_format=ROW
' >> "$F"; fi; mysqld --user=mysql --help --verbose >/dev/null 2>&1 || { mv "$F.mxbak" "$F"; echo 'config validate failed, rolled back'; exit 1; }

rules.title: 禁用 LOAD DATA LOCAL INFILE
rules.description: local_infile=OFF 防客户端任意读文件.

fix.command:
set -e; F=/etc/my.cnf; [ -f "$F" ] || { printf '[mysqld]
' > "$F"; }; [ -f "$F.mxbak" ] || cp "$F" "$F.mxbak"; if grep -Eq '^[[:space:]]*local_infile[[:space:]]*=' "$F"; then sed -ri 's|^[[:space:]]*local_infile[[:space:]]*=.*|local_infile=0|' "$F"; else grep -Eq '^[[:space:]]*\[mysqld\]' "$F" && sed -ri '0,/^[[:space:]]*\[mysqld\]/s||[mysqld]
local_infile=0|' "$F" || printf '[mysqld]
local_infile=0
' >> "$F"; fi; mysqld --user=mysql --help --verbose >/dev/null 2>&1 || { mv "$F.mxbak" "$F"; echo 'config validate failed, rolled back'; exit 1; }

rules.title: secure_file_priv 限制
rules.description: SELECT INTO OUTFILE 路径限制.

fix.command:
set -e; F=/etc/my.cnf; [ -f "$F" ] || { printf '[mysqld]
' > "$F"; }; [ -f "$F.mxbak" ] || cp "$F" "$F.mxbak"; install -d -o mysql -g mysql -m 750 /var/lib/mysql-files; if grep -Eq '^[[:space:]]*secure_file_priv[[:space:]]*=' "$F"; then sed -ri 's|^[[:space:]]*secure_file_priv[[:space:]]*=.*|secure_file_priv=/var/lib/mysql-files/|' "$F"; else grep -Eq '^[[:space:]]*\[mysqld\]' "$F" && sed -ri '0,/^[[:space:]]*\[mysqld\]/s||[mysqld]
secure_file_priv=/var/lib/mysql-files/|' "$F" || printf '[mysqld]
secure_file_priv=/var/lib/mysql-files/
' >> "$F"; fi; mysqld --user=mysql --help --verbose >/dev/null 2>&1 || { mv "$F.mxbak" "$F"; echo 'config validate failed, rolled back'; exit 1; }

fix.suggestion: MariaDB: INSTALL SONAME 'simple_password_check'; MySQL: INSTALL PLUGIN validate_password SONAME 'validate_password.so'; SET GLOBAL validate_password.policy=STRONG;
fix.command: if mysql -uroot -BNe "SHOW PLUGINS" 2>/dev/null | grep -qiE "validate_password|simple_password_check|cracklib_password_check"; then echo 'password plugin already installed, skip'; else mysql -uroot -e "INSTALL SONAME 'simple_password_check'" 2>/dev/null || true; fi
